hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm[[:space:]]+-rf[[:space:]]+/|sudo[[:space:]]+rm|curl[[:space:]]|wget[[:space:]]|nc[[:space:]]|DROP[[:space:]]+DATABASE|TRUNCATE[[:space:]]+TABLE|chmod[[:space:]]+777)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"보안 베이스라인 위반 명령입니다 (standards/security-baseline.md). 실행이 차단되었습니다."}'; else echo '{}'; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.kt$'; then if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew ktlintCheck --daemon -q 2>&1 | tail -15 || true; fi; fi; if echo "$path" | grep -qE 'docs/features/.+\.md$'; then head -15 "$path" 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^---' || echo '[WARN] Front-matter 누락: '"$path"; fi; echo '{}'

input=$(cat); prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // empty'); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '(API_KEY|SECRET|PASSWORD|TOKEN)=[^[:space:]]+'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"프롬프트에 시크릿으로 보이는 값이 포함되어 있습니다. 제거 후 다시 입력하세요."}'; else echo '{}'; fi

if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -d mcp-server ]; then uv --directory ./mcp-server run python -c 'from agent_platform_mcp.server import mcp; print(f"[MCP] agent-platform server OK ({mcp.name})")' 2>&1 | tail -1; else echo '[MCP] WARN: uv or mcp-server not found — MCP tools disabled'; fi
